# Executive Summary — After-Hours PC Energy Management

> **Usage:** One-page summary for C-level / directors. Replace all `[PLACEHOLDER]` values. Keep it concise — executives want the bottom line.

---

## After-Hours PC Shutdown Initiative

**Date:** [DATE]
**Prepared by:** IT Department
**Status:** [Proposed / In Progress / Complete]

---

### The Problem

**[PERCENTAGE]% of company PCs are left running after business hours every night.**

Our monitoring data (collected over [X] weeks across [NUM] devices) shows:

| Finding | Data |
|---------|------|
| PCs left on after [TIME] (average weeknight) | **[NUM] out of [TOTAL]** ([%]%) |
| PCs on with no active user session | **[NUM]** ([%]%) |
| Estimated annual electricity wasted | **[KWH] kWh** |
| Estimated annual cost wasted | **$[COST]** |
| Equivalent CO2 emissions | **[TONS] metric tons/year** |

### The Solution

Deploy an **automatic shutdown policy** using our existing Microsoft Intune infrastructure:

1. PCs receive a **5-minute warning notification** at [TIME].
2. If still on, the PC **shuts down automatically**.
3. Users who need to work late can **postpone the shutdown** with one command.
4. PCs that must stay on (monitoring, servers) are **exempted**.

### Cost

| Item | Cost |
|------|------|
| Software | **$0** (uses existing Intune license) |
| Hardware | **$0** |
| IT staff time (one-time setup) | ~20 hours |
| **Total investment** | **~$[COST]** (staff time only) |

### Expected Savings

| Metric | Annual Value |
|--------|-------------|
| Electricity saved | **[KWH] kWh** |
| Cost saved | **$[COST]** |
| CO2 reduction | **[KG] kg** |
| Equipment lifespan extension | ~10-15% longer |
| **ROI** | **[X]%** |
| **Payback period** | **[X] weeks** |

### Risk Assessment

| Risk | Likelihood | Mitigation |
|------|-----------|------------|
| User loses unsaved work | Low | 5-minute warning + abort option |
| Critical PC shut down | Low | Exception mechanism + exclusion groups |
| Employee pushback | Medium | Clear communication + exception process |
| Technical failure | Low | Phased rollout + instant rollback |

### Timeline

| Phase | When | What |
|-------|------|------|
| Monitoring | Weeks 1-2 | Collect baseline data (done) |
| Communication | Week 3 | Notify employees |
| Pilot | Weeks 4-5 | IT department only |
| Full rollout | Week 6+ | All devices |

### Recommendation

**Approve the full rollout.** The solution uses existing infrastructure, has zero software cost, pays for itself within weeks, and reduces our environmental footprint. The phased approach and built-in safeguards minimize risk.
